title: Lightly Crispy Moroccan Burrata Mrouzia
description: A buttery and crispy Moroccan dish featuring burrata, poached in a low-fat friendly mrouzia form, served in a bento-box.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the mrouzia spice blend, salt, and black pepper.
Place the burrata cheese in a bento-box and sprinkle the spice blend mixture evenly over the top.
Drizzle the olive oil and lemon juice over the burrata cheese.
Add the minced garlic and chopped parsley on top of the burrata cheese.
Pour the low-sodium chicken broth into the bento-box, making sure the burrata cheese is partially submerged.
Cover the bento-box with aluminum foil and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is lightly crispy.
Remove the bento-box from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
